THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, ANASTACIO HERNANDEZ, PETRONILA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1174 ALABAMA STREET, SAN FRANCISCO $2,685.00 RENT, $630.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,435.00, STAYED UNTIL MAR-15-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE STIPULATION FOR ADDTL TERMS. IF DEFTS COMPLY WITH TERMS OF SETTLEMENT DETAILED IN STIPULATION, PLTF WILL MOVE TO VACATE JUDGMNT & ENTER DISMISSAL.

CASE CONTINUED UNTIL 2PM FOR POSSIBLE SETTLMNT & STIP SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES. AT 2PM, BOTH DEFTS WERE PRESENT, CASE WAS SETTLED ON THE RECORD. PLTF SUBMITTED PREPARED STIP FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT.
